svg.style: background: transparent; background-color: transparent; color-scheme: light dark;
svg.content:
<mxfile host="Electron"> <diagram name="AI 越界与架构守护拦截" id="ai-guardrail"> <mxGraphModel dx="-514" dy="-129" grid="0" gridSize="10" guides="1" tooltips="1" connect="1" arrows="1" fold="0" page="0" pageScale="1" pageWidth="980" pageHeight="420" math="0" shadow="0"> <root> <mxCell id="0" /> <mxCell id="1" parent="0" /> <mxCell id="GRP" parent="1" style="rounded=0;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#f8fafc;strokeColor=#cbd5e1;verticalAlign=top;fontStyle=1;fontSize=13;fontColor=#1e293b;spacingTop=6;" value="AI 写代码不在乎架构边界——给它自由，它选最短路径，而最短路径往往就是越界" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="350" width="920" x="30" y="30" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="REQ" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffffff;strokeColor=#2563eb;fontColor=#1e293b;fontSize=12;" value="我：实现 X 功能" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="50" width="140" x="60" y="180" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="AI" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#dbeafe;strokeColor=#2563eb;fontColor=#1e293b;fontSize=12;" value="AI 生成代码" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="50" width="140" x="240" y="180" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="Q" parent="1" style="rhombus;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#dbeafe;strokeColor=#2563eb;fontColor=#1e293b;fontSize=12;" value="AI 在乎
架构吗?" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="70" width="130" x="420" y="170" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="W1" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffffff;strokeColor=#2563eb;fontColor=#1e293b;fontSize=12;" value="Controller 里
直连数据库" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="50" width="160" x="610" y="70" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="W2" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffffff;strokeColor=#2563eb;fontColor=#1e293b;fontSize=12;" value="跨模块调别人的
Repository" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="50" width="160" x="610" y="180" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="W3" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffffff;strokeColor=#d4a017;fontColor=#1e293b;fontSize=12;" value="最短路径实现
（「能跑通」就行）" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="50" width="170" x="610" y="290" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="G" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#dbeafe;strokeColor=#2563eb;fontColor=#1e293b;fontSize=12;fontStyle=1;" value="架构守护拦下
提交时 CI 挂掉，根本进不来" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="70" width="130" x="800" y="170" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="E1" edge="1" parent="1" source="REQ" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;html=1;endArrow=classic;strokeColor=#2563eb;" target="AI"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="E2" edge="1" parent="1" source="AI" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;html=1;endArrow=classic;strokeColor=#2563eb;" target="Q"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="E3" edge="1" parent="1" source="Q" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;html=1;endArrow=classic;strokeColor=#2563eb;fontColor=#64748b;fontSize=10;" target="W1" value="不在乎"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="E4" edge="1" parent="1" source="Q" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;html=1;endArrow=classic;strokeColor=#2563eb;fontColor=#64748b;fontSize=10;" target="W2" value="不在乎"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="E5" edge="1" parent="1" source="Q" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;html=1;endArrow=classic;strokeColor=#d4a017;fontColor=#64748b;fontSize=10;" target="W3" value="在乎的是能跑通"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="E6" edge="1" parent="1" source="W1" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;html=1;endArrow=classic;strokeColor=#94a3b8;" target="G"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="E7" edge="1" parent="1" source="W2" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;html=1;endArrow=classic;strokeColor=#94a3b8;" target="G"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="E8" edge="1" parent="1" source="W3" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;html=1;endArrow=classic;strokeColor=#94a3b8;" target="G"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> </root> </mxGraphModel> </diagram> </mxfile>

rect.style: fill: light-dark(rgb(248, 250, 252), rgb(21, 23, 25)); stroke: light-dark(rgb(203, 213, 225), rgb(47, 56, 66));

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe flex-start; justify-content: unsafe center; width: 918px; height: 1px; padding-top: 13px; margin-left: 1px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: center; color: #1e293b;
display: inline-block; font-size: 13px; font-family: Helvetica; color: light-dark(#1e293b, #c3ccdc); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; font-weight: bold; white-space: normal; word-wrap: normal;

div.div: AI 写代码不在乎架构边界——给它自由，它选最短路径，而最短路径往往就是越界
